items.definition_en: An apple is a round fruit with red or green skin.
items.example_en: I brought an apple for my lunch today.

items.definition_en: A pear is a sweet fruit with green or yellow skin.
items.example_en: She ate a juicy pear after dinner.

items.definition_en: A tomato is a soft red or yellow fruit used in salads.
items.example_en: We picked a big tomato from the garden.

items.definition_en: A carrot is a long orange vegetable that grows in the ground.
items.example_en: He put a carrot in the salad.

items.definition_en: Lettuce is a green leafy vegetable used in salads.
items.example_en: She bought fresh lettuce at the market.

items.definition_en: A cucumber is a long green vegetable often eaten raw.
items.example_en: I like to add cucumber to my sandwich.

items.definition_en: A potato is a round vegetable that grows underground.
items.example_en: We grew a lot of potatoes last year.

items.definition_en: An onion is a round vegetable with many layers and a strong smell.
items.example_en: I need an onion for this soup.

items.definition_en: A pepper is a colorful, sweet or spicy vegetable.
items.example_en: He cut a red pepper for the salad.

items.definition_en: A bean is a small, edible seed that grows in pods.
items.example_en: We picked beans from the garden this morning.

items.definition_en: A pumpkin is a large, round, orange vegetable.
items.example_en: We grew a big pumpkin for Halloween.

items.definition_en: A strawberry is a small, red, sweet fruit with tiny seeds on its surface.
items.example_en: She likes to eat a strawberry with yogurt.

items.definition_en: A raspberry is a soft, red, sweet fruit made of many small parts.
items.example_en: He picked a raspberry and ate it.

items.definition_en: A grape is a small, round fruit that grows in bunches.
items.example_en: I bought a bunch of grapes from the shop.

items.definition_en: A melon is a large, sweet fruit with a hard skin.
items.example_en: She cut a melon for our snack.

items.definition_en: A zucchini is a green vegetable shaped like a long cylinder.
items.example_en: We cooked zucchini with some herbs.

items.definition_en: A pea is a small, green, round vegetable.
items.example_en: Little peas are my sister's favorite vegetable.

items.definition_en: Cabbage is a green or purple vegetable with many leaves.
items.example_en: She made a salad with fresh cabbage.

items.definition_en: A radish is a small, round vegetable that is often red on the outside.
items.example_en: He sliced a radish for the salad.

items.definition_en: Sweet corn is a yellow vegetable with soft, sweet kernels.
items.example_en: We boiled sweet corn for lunch today.
